title: Modernized Future 32x
description: Modern Minecraft is one of my favorite things, as in modern furniture and decorations, with shaders... AMAZING! :)
body:
My mod I have made for you right now only contains a few things (here is a list):

White Block Flat, Black Block Flat

I promise you, in the future, this mod is going to look like the Ultimate Immersion mod, shout out to them! (I got the idea to do this because of their amazing mod, check it out!)

I gladly give credit to the authors and creators for the Ultimate Immersion Resource Pack and Mod, because they gave me the idea to create my own very detailed and awsome mod that looks modern like theirs.

For the best experience: Use shaders like SEUS PTGI HRR 2.1, or SEUS PTGI HRR 3.0 if you can, or even any other shader you love, like Rethinking Voxels for example. (Or Shrimple)

This mod is going to add even more content imaginable and unimaginable that I create using MCreator 2024.2, I give credit to them as well, and my other projects I have made are also using MCreator. Modernized Future will aim to collect all of the coolest modern blocks, and items to make the game more Modernized, like the Future! :)

(I also recommend using the Physics Mod (even the Pro version which is free now) with my mod, but turning off collapsing if you like.)

[USE THE "FRAMED BLOCKS" MOD, AND THE "ASSORTED DECOR" MOD, OR EVEN THE "LITTLE TILES" MOD, WITH THIS TO GET WHAT IT WAS MEANT FOR! :)]
